episodes.description: An array of episodes for the show.

aired_date.description: The air date of the episode, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

anyOf.description: The episode is not based on the manga, but is considered canon by the anime adaptation.
The episode is not based on the manga, and is considered filler.
The episode is based on the manga, and is considered canon.
The episode is based on the manga, but also contains filler content.

override_date.description: Whether to ignore the aired_date when validating sorting of dates.

mappings.description: IDs for the show on various anime databases.

comments.description: Leave some notes about the show, for editorial purposes. This field is not required, and will not be included in the output.
